coverage_limitation: No scan was performed — the block device could not be located.

interpretation.customer_summary: No disk scan was performed — the hard disk device could not be located.
interpretation.technician_summary: Block device not found. Check if the NTFS partition is mounted correctly.
interpretation.what_this_means: The module was unable to identify the underlying block device for the Windows partition.
interpretation.recommended_action: Verify the target path and check that the partition is mounted (e.g. findmnt -t ntfs,fuseblk).

warnings: Block device could not be found — no scan performed.
